viewer.title: Service Agreement
viewer.consent: I have read and agree to the terms of this agreement
viewer.alreadySigned: You have already signed this agreement
viewer.agreementFullySigned: This agreement has been fully executed

steps.confirmation: You'll receive a confirmation email with the agreement copy
steps.contact: Our team will contact you within 24 hours

editor.title: Agreement Template Editor
editor.enablePreSigning: Enable pre-signing (Provider signs before sending to client)

create.title: Create Agreement
create.name: Name
create.signNowThenSend: Sign now as provider, then send to client
create.sendForParallel: Send to all parties for parallel signing

preSigning.sequentialDescription: Signers sign in order. Provider signs first, then client receives invitation.
preSigning.parallelDescription: All signers receive invitations simultaneously. Any order allowed.
preSigning.noSigners: No signers configured yet. Add at least one signer to proceed.
preSigning.sequentialSentMessage: The first signer has been notified. Subsequent signers will be notified after each signature.
preSigning.parallelSentMessage: All {{count}} signers have been notified via email.
